examples.name: Cat 9k variable format with single switch
examples.input:
starfleet-1#show boot
BOOT variable = bootflash:cat9k_iosxe.BLD_V173_THROTTLE_LATEST_20200421_032634.SSA.bin;
Configuration Register is 0x102
MANUAL_BOOT variable = no
BAUD variable = 9600
ENABLE_BREAK variable does not exist
BOOTMODE variable does not exist
IPXE_TIMEOUT variable does not exist
CONFIG_FILE variable =

examples.name: Live device output
examples.input:
BOOT variable does not exist
CONFIG_FILE variable does not exist
BOOTLDR variable does not exist
Configuration register is 0x2102

examples.name: Path-list format with boot optimization and DHCP config
examples.input:
BOOT path-list      : flash:/c3560cx-universalk9-mz.152-7.E4/c3560cx-universalk9-mz.152-7.E4.bin
Config file         : flash:/config.text
Private Config file : flash:/private-config.text
Enable Break        : yes
Manual Boot         : no
Allow Dev Key         : yes
HELPER path-list    :
Auto upgrade        : yes
Auto upgrade path   :
Boot optimization   : disabled
NVRAM/Config file
      buffer size:   524288
Timeout for Config
          Download:    0 seconds
Config Download
       via DHCP:       disabled (next boot: disabled)

examples.name: Dual supervisor with active and standby boot variables
examples.input:
PI-9500-svl-102#show boot
BOOT variable = bootflash:packages.conf;
MANUAL_BOOT variable = no
BAUD variable = 9600
ENABLE_BREAK variable = yes
BOOTMODE variable does not exist
IPXE_TIMEOUT variable does not exist
CONFIG_FILE variable =

Standby BOOT variable = bootflash:packages.conf;
Standby MANUAL_BOOT variable = no
Standby BAUD variable = 9600
Standby ENABLE_BREAK variable = yes
Standby BOOTMODE variable does not exist
Standby IPXE_TIMEOUT variable does not exist
Standby CONFIG_FILE variable =
